//: Autobahn-testsuite fuzzingclient config for Hyperion's WS echo rackup.
Boots an echo server on ws://127.0.0.1:9888/echo (bench/ws_echo.ru),
then drives the canonical RFC 6455 conformance fuzzer against it.
Run via Docker (no local Python dep):
After the run open ./autobahn-reports/index.html for the HTML report.
Cases note: the full RFC 6455 case set is ~520 cases. We exclude
very-large-message cases (9.*) to keep the run under ~5 minutes;
include them in a soak run before publishing a fresh msg-size cap.
